name: healthcare-data-mcp
description: Local MCP access to public healthcare facility, quality, market, finance, workforce, and claims data.
long_description: Runs one selected healthcare-data-mcp server over stdio for Claude Desktop. The packaged launcher delegates to the repo's hc-mcp entry point and defaults to the CMS facility server.

server_name.title: Healthcare Data MCP server
server_name.description: Server to run: cms-facility, service-area, geo-demographics, drive-time, hospital-quality, health-system-profiler, financial-intelligence, price-transparency, physician-referral-network, workforce-analytics, claims-analytics, public-records, web-intelligence, discovery, or gateway.
